title: Better Harnesses
description: Adds a harness upgrade to improve happy ghast flying speeds. Craft a propeller from 1 iron surrounded by 4 iron nuggets and combine it with a harness to increase the flying speed by 100%
body:
# Info
Do you hate the slow speed of happy ghasts? Do you want the speed to be doubled? Well this datapack has you covered!
You can craft a new harness with a propeller to increase the speed of happy ghasts. This doubles the speed of those slow happy ghasts.


## Recipes and Images
![Propeller crafting recipe is 1 iron ingot surrounded by 4 iron nuggests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/D3WhTbyE/images/040d4df691fdeea58464e00402b943a95ea30829.png)

![Combined the propeller with a harness to upgrade it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/D3WhTbyE/images/740f1cdb479fe3278d0528f695cd4b4a7113936e.png)

![Doubles the flying speed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/D3WhTbyE/images/ebd001f946686299f45da904df7df3a29c5c9ef0.png)

![3rd Person view of the happy ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/D3WhTbyE/images/cc7f8df56c3f41f9ad2101719b659bec5854c6b5.png)

# FAQ
Q: I get a missing texture when trying to use this how do I fix it?  
A: Make sure to download the resourcepack

Q: Where can I download the resourcepack?  
A: Those who click the big download button at the top of the screen are only prompted to download the datapack and not the resourcepack. Modrinth does not show both of them in that menu. You instead have to go to the versions tab.

<details>
  <summary>
    Where to download the resourcepack
  </summary>
  
  ### First you have to go to the versions tab

  ![Go to the Versions Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ad57d13fae1d012d90568975a6421626826dfa9.png)
  ### Then you go to the version you want

  ![Go to the latest version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/859f2beded095309e921e06c96eb5d38507018c8.png)

### Then underneath the datapack download is the resourcepack download
![Click the 2nd download button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa3734993d8a204a1d6b961ff407408235286f92.png)
  
</details>
